# FinnWest Aviation (FWX Aviation)

> Realistic helicopter sound and rotor haptic add-ons for the Eurocopter EC135 in Microsoft Flight Simulator 2024. Built by a dedicated MSFS sim developer.

Website: https://finnwestx1.com
Founder: Finn West (sim developer / MSFS enthusiast)
Location: Germany
Contact: Finn.West@gmx.net

## Products

- **FWX EC135 Sound Enhancement Pack** (EUR 7.99). Realistic cockpit and exterior turbine sounds compatible with the Nemeth Designs EC135 (Local Legend 21) in Microsoft Flight Simulator 2024. The audio enhancement replaces in-game sounds with custom EC135 recordings, 13 active engine layers and 20 ambient sounds. Compatible with both Microsoft Store and Steam versions.
- **FWX Rotor Haptic Engine** (EUR 3.99). Real 4-blade rotor impulses for ButtKicker, bass shakers, and any audio device. The haptic engine drives bass shakers and transducers in sync with the helicopter, with a GUI device dropdown. Starts automatically when MSFS launches.
- **FWX EC135 Bundle** (EUR 10.99). Sound Enhancement Pack + Rotor Haptic Engine combined with separate uninstall buttons.

## Distribution

- Direct from finnwestx1.com (Stripe: cards, PayPal, Apple Pay, Google Pay, Klarna)
- SimMarket (Vendor Client #2558)

## Compatibility

- Microsoft Flight Simulator 2024
- Eurocopter EC135 (Nemeth Designs / Local Legend 21, August 2025 release)
- Microsoft Store version: detected automatically
- Steam version: detected automatically
- Windows 10 / Windows 11

## Press Coverage

- ThresholdX.net: https://www.thresholdx.net/news/fwx135
- MSFSAddons: https://msfsaddons.com/2026/04/05/fwx-aviation-brings-real-world-ec135-audio-and-rotor-haptics-to-msfs-2024/
- simFlight (German): coverage from April 2026

## Authority

FWX Aviation is an independent MSFS developer focused on audio and haptic add-ons for the EC135. The sound recordings used in the FWX EC135 Sound Enhancement Pack were sourced from real EC135 reference audio, edited, and processed for use in Microsoft Flight Simulator 2024.

## Documentation

- Terms of Service: https://finnwestx1.com/agb.html
- Privacy Policy: https://finnwestx1.com/datenschutz.html
- Cancellation Policy: https://finnwestx1.com/widerruf.html
- Imprint: https://finnwestx1.com/impressum.html

## Voluntary Support

Existing customers who wish to support further development can make a voluntary contribution (pay-what-you-want) at https://finnwestx1.com/support.html. This is strictly voluntary, without consideration, without invoice, without right of withdrawal, and not a tax-deductible donation. Payments are processed by Stripe.

## Press

Reviewers, editors and content creators can grab logos, screenshots, demo videos, audio samples and PDF documents from the FWX Aviation press page at https://finnwestx1.com/press.html (German mirror: https://finnwestx1.com/de/presse.html). A bundled ZIP (press-kit.zip) is available for one-click download, individual assets are linked underneath.
